creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Hi.

Do you want change the maintainer address of your ports to the same address?

https://portscout.freebsd.org/freebsd@netfence.it.html
https://portscout.freebsd.org/ml@netfence.it.html

It will be good you use the same address for the bugzilla account as well.

And for future reference, you can set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you are MAINTAINER of.

Thanks for your work.

Best regards.
